forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the afternoon. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the early morning then turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 30 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the south in the late morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 35 to 50 km/h in the early morning then turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely later this evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding near the coast. Damaging winds possible. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding near the coast. Damaging winds possible. Winds northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h turning northerly 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible in the west. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the day then decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible in the west. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the early morning then turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Hawker, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the early morning then turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 35 to 50 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to northwesterly 40 to 60 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the early morning then turning northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, becoming less likely later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then becoming northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 27.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible south of Woomera. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning westerly 35 to 55 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 30.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly clear. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, becoming less likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Yunta in the late afternoon and evening. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog north of Leigh Creek. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 24.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible about the Gammon Ranges. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 19 to 31.

Mostly sunny. The chance of raised dust east of Leigh Creek in the morning. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Yunta in the afternoon. Damaging winds possible about the Gammon Ranges. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
